info.title: LMS Express API

LoginResponse.description: JWT access and refresh tokens are set as HTTP-only cookies by the implementation.

post.summary: Register a new siswa or tutor

post.description: The implementation sets access and refresh tokens as HTTP-only cookies.
Requires a valid refreshToken cookie and sets a new access-token cookie.
